query:

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS elevenlabsVoiceId VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS elevenlabsVoiceName VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS voiceSampleUrl TEXT;
